title: Optix Client
description: Optix Client is a cutting-edge, Fabric-based utility client built for players who demand performance and precision. Designed with a focus on PvP and minimalist aesthetics, it provides a seamless experience for modern Minecraft versions.
body:
**Optix Client — Precision & Performance**
Optix Client is a modern, lightweight utility client designed for the Fabric loader. Built with a focus on competitive PvP and high-performance gameplay, it provides the essential tools you need with a clean, distraction-free interface.

🚀 Key Features
Custom ClickGUI: A fast and intuitive menu to toggle your modules instantly.

Draggable HUD: Fully customizable screen elements. Move your coordinates, FPS, and status effects exactly where you want them.

Built for PvP: Optimized code to ensure maximum FPS and low input latency during intense combat.

Modern Aesthetics: A sleek silver-themed UI that stays out of your way while providing all the info you need.

🛠 Technical Specs
Platform: Fabric.

Minecraft Version: 1.21.x.

Java Requirement: Java 21 or higher.
